question: Do I need to book a call to get started?
answer: No. Aiprosol is self-serve first. Most clients start with a digital product or the free ROI Audit, then upgrade to a managed plan when the numbers prove out. Calendly calls are reserved for Enterprise enquiries only.

question: Where should I start?
answer: Run the free 60-second ROI Audit. It calculates your projected savings and recommends the right next step — a digital product, a managed plan, or an Enterprise call.

question: How quickly can my first automation go live?
answer: Self-serve products are downloadable instantly and most can be implemented in 1–3 days. Starter and Growth plans go live within 14 days. Enterprise white-glove rollouts take 3–4 weeks.

question: What's the difference between a product and a plan?
answer: Products are self-serve toolkits, playbooks, and templates you implement yourself ($17–$997 one-time). Plans are managed engagements where Aiprosol designs, builds, and runs the automations for you ($997–$7,997/mo).

question: How does pricing work?
answer: Three tiers: Starter $997/mo (10–50 employees), Growth $2,997/mo (50–200), Enterprise $7,997/mo (200+). Plus 19 self-serve products from $17–$997 if you want to start there.

question: Can I cancel anytime?
answer: Yes — Starter and Growth have no minimum commitment. Enterprise has a 6-month minimum because of the architectural investment, then renews month-to-month.

question: Do you charge in USD?
answer: Yes — all pricing is in US Dollars. We serve clients globally and bill in USD regardless of your location.

question: Do you offer annual billing?
answer: Annual billing with a 15% discount is on the roadmap. For now, monthly billing only.

question: Can I upgrade or downgrade?
answer: Anytime. Upgrades pro-rate immediately; downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.

question: What if my automation breaks?
answer: Every managed plan includes monitoring, alerting, and Arora's auto-recovery layer. Most issues are auto-resolved before you'd notice. SLA: 24h on Starter, 4h on Growth, 1h on Enterprise.

question: Do I need to be technical?
answer: No — Aiprosol is built for non-technical operators. Arora handles the technical architecture; you stay focused on the business. Every automation comes with plain-English documentation and a video walkthrough.

question: What tools do you integrate with?
answer: Anything with an API. Most engagements involve Make, Zapier, n8n, HubSpot, Pipedrive, ActiveCampaign, Calendly, Xero, Slack, Notion, plus the major LLM providers. If your stack isn't on the list, we'll integrate it or tell you honestly that it's not feasible.

question: Who owns the automations after they're built?
answer: You do. All workflows, prompts, and integrations live in your accounts. We never lock you in. The managed plan covers ongoing operation, monitoring, and iteration.

question: Is our data secure?
answer: All data stays in your tools. Aiprosol's middleware uses encrypted tokens, rotates keys, and ships with full audit logging. Enterprise tier includes SOC 2 commitments and a custom DPA.

question: What's the 90-day guarantee?
answer: If a managed plan fails to reclaim 35+ hours/week within 90 days of go-live (and you've provided the documented inputs and access on time), we work for free until you do. This is in addition to your cancellation rights.

question: Can I get a refund on a digital product?
answer: Yes — 7-day no-questions-asked refund window. Reply to your order email and we'll process within 5 business days.

question: Who is Arora?
answer: Arora is the AI CEO of Aiprosol — the operational lead, not a chatbot or mascot. She handles strategy, system architecture, content, and most customer interactions. The CEO role is filled by AI by design: it's how we keep automations grounded in actual operating reality.

question: Who founded Aiprosol?
answer: Srijan Paudel founded Aiprosol and serves as Chairman. Aiprosol operates as a global, borderless company with clients across multiple industries.

question: Why is the CEO an AI?
answer: Because if we're going to sell automation, the company itself should run on it. Arora makes most operational decisions; Srijan reviews the strategic ones. The model keeps us honest about what AI can and can't do — and ensures every automation we ship works for real operators.

question: Do you serve clients outside the UK?
answer: Yes. Aiprosol is a global company with clients across multiple continents. All pricing is in USD. Geographic location doesn't affect onboarding speed or support SLA.

question: How can I become an affiliate or partner?
answer: Apply at /affiliate — 30% on digital products, 20% recurring on managed plans, 60-day cookie. Application is reviewed within 5 business days, no phone interview.
